posts.text:
"Following orders" tweet


DNI Tulsi Gabbard (@DNIGabbard)

Donald Trump was overwhelmingly elected by the American people to be our President and Commander in Chief. As our Commander in Chief, he is responsible for determining what is and is not an imminent threat, and whether or not to take action he deems necessary to protect the safety and security of our troops, the American people and our country. 

The Office of the Director of National Intelligence is responsible for helping coordinate a

Seamus Culleton is an Irish national being held by ICE in Texas for nearly 6 months. He's lived in the U.S. for 20 years, is married to a U.S. citizen, has no criminal record, and was detained despite holding a valid work permit according to CBS News.

Video
  




U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (@ICEgov)

Happy Saint Patrick's Day from ICE!





— https://nitter.net/ICEgov/status/2033985101848051723#m

When JD Vance sold his soul to MAGA he didn't think he was going to have to defend another reckless gulf war, and he's not sure he wants his name on this dumpster fire. Watch Rick on MSNOW.

Video

Trucker on rising gas prices:
"If I'm on E, it's about $207 every day right now. Yeah, it's pretty crazy. I went from $140 a day to $207 a day."

Video
  




The Lincoln Project (@ProjectLincoln)

Today's average for a gallon of regular is $3.70. It's up from $3.45 a week ago, and $2.93 a month ago. Trump spends his weekends golfing, sleeping, and talking about interior decorating while you're paying more than ever for basic goods.



— https://nitter.net/ProjectLincoln/status/20335951590409093

As the "no new wars" president plunges us into another foreign war without a plan, @MarkHertling shares what war in the gulf is really like, and how messy this will get for Trump and Hegseth: piped.video/watch?v=MsCbTnVP…

He appointed him.


CSPAN (@cspan)

President Trump on resignation of Joe Kent, Director of National Counterterrorism Center:" I always thought he was weak on security."

Video
  


Community note: President Trump appointed Joe Kent to be Director of National Counterterrorism. Implying, at one point, Trump thought Kent was capable of doing the job of keeping Americans secure.

c-span.org/congress/?cham…

nytimes.com/2025/07/30/us/…



— https://nitter.net/cspan/status/2033938685402456305#m

They dragged JD Vance out of hiding yesterday to make a show of "unity", but still haven't updated his excuses. He's got nothing.

Everyone should be asking @JDVance his position on support for this war. Tankers or secure the oil fields with soldiers?


Aaron Rupar (@atrupar)

Q: Given your past skepticism of foreign adventurism, are you completely on board with the war on Iran?

JD VANCE: I know what you're trying to do. You're trying to drive a wedge. All of us should pray for success

(Not a

Hassett: If the war were to be extended, it wouldn't really disrupt the U.S. economy very much at all. It would hurt consumers, but that's really the last of our concerns right now.

Video

A pretty major resignation by a Trump admin official over the war in Iran.


Joe Kent (@joekent16jan19)

After much reflection, I have decided to resign from my position as Director of the National Counterterrorism Center, effective today.

I cannot in good conscience support the ongoing war in Iran. Iran posed no imminent threat to our nation, and it is clear that we started this war due to pressure from Israel and its powerful American lobby.

It has been an honor serving under @POTUS and @DNI

Trump's life story is a joke to you @JohnCornyn???


Igor Bobic (@igorbobic)

Meanwhile, Cornyn's campaign is out with a "music video" featuring a Paxton look-alike drinking and partying with mistresses piped.video/watch?v=9WzrCr4H…









— https://nitter.net/igorbobic/status/2033885414407225384#m

Trump and Hegseth are desperate to control the press right now. Too bad this isn't the dictatorship they wished it was. Watch Rick on MSNOW

Video

Character matters in The White House, or at least it used to. Watch @stuartpstevens on MSNOW:

Video

Who could have possibly seen this coming?




Acyn (@Acyn)

Trump: They weren't supposed to go after all these other countries in the Middle East. So they hit Qatar, Saudi Arabia, UAE, Bahrain, Kuwait. Nobody expected that. We were shocked

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/Acyn/status/2033606083038875863#m

"The President of the United States, Gavin Newscum.."

Video

Dementia.


Headquarters (@HQNewsNow)

CNN airs compilation of Trump's contradictions from his afternoon event

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/HQNewsNow/status/2033639468448579887#m
Lt. General Mark Hertling On War In The Middle East
War Is Not MAGA Cosplay: Lt. General Mark Hertling on the Iran War Dumpster Fire
Coward
Trump’s Iran Clusterf*ck War Is The Ultimate Epstein Distraction
What Trump's Iran War Will Cost YOU
Republicans Are PANICKING, Pretending to Be “Independent” To Fool Voters
NYT Reporter Calls Out Trump to His Face Over Iran School Bombing
We need justice right now.
Law and Order Has Left Chat: Jack Smith's Deputy on the Lawlessness of Congress
Did Kristi Noem see it coming?
When JD Vance sold his soul to MAGA he didn't think he was going to have to defend another reckless gulf war, and he's not sure he wants his name on this dumpster fire. Watch Rick on MSNOW.

As the "no new wars" president plunges us into another foreign war without a plan, Lt. Gen. Mark Hertling shares what war in the gulf is really like, and how messy this will get for Trump and Hegseth: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MsCbTnVP51c
Hassett: If the war were to be extended, it wouldn't really disrupt the U.S. economy very much at all. It would hurt consumers, but that's really the last of our concerns right now.
Trump and Hegseth are desperate to control the press right now. Too bad this isn't the dictatorship they wished it was. Watch Rick on MSNOW

ICYMI: You may not be able to afford gas or groceries but Trump and Kegsbreath don't care. They have schools to bomb and expensive dinners to enjoy. Watch The Breakdown here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=nIaC_riI-RI

JD Vance in NC: "BBB is chock full of good things for this district and state"

(Big Beautiful Bill will cause 450,000 North Carolinians to lose health care coverage)
Trump on war: "we can go forever"
150 US soldiers have been injured, 5,000 more heading into Iran today. Trump is a coward, criminal, five-time draft dodging piece of shit sending your kids to war.
5,000 Marines are going to the desert to fight a war, Trump's going to Palm Beach to fight the greens.

In the past 2 weeks of zero clarity, the Trump administration is making one thing crystal clear: Wars don’t erase political crises — they amplify them. Rick Wilson explains: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=13kJ8j0wfEY
Veteran: Trump promised that there would be no wars. So to get into this war, it's such a fundamental betrayal of one of the core tenets of this movement.
TONIGHT: If you can’t figure out what’s going on in Iran, that’s ok. The administration can’t either. The Breakdown airs at 7 PM EST: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=nIaC_riI-RI

"Covid will be over in two weeks. Gone by Easter"
"We're signing a health care plan within two weeks"
"They’re dying, Russians & Ukrainians. I want them to stop dying. I’ll have that done — I’ll have that done in 24 hours"

Based on his record, this isn’t ending anytime soon.

Iowa farmer: This fertilizer shortage is going to affect everybody. It could lead to a decrease in yields. If you look at that countrywide, corn, soybeans, cotton, rice, that will increase prices. It's gonna be a train wreck for consumers.

Trump's rushing to Kentucky today. He’s not there to honor the soldier from KY lost in his foolish war, nor address Kentuckians concerns on affordability. He’s there to help primary a Republican who pushed for the Epstein Files’ release.
Kristi's place freed up https://www.nytimes.com/2026/03/10/us/politics/bondi-military-housing-threats.html?smid=url-share

A reporter held Trump's feet to the fire for once, and Trump admits he's just making all this shit up. Rick Wilson breaks down the moment on our YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RXLZA4VgVyA&t=246s

Rick Wilson breaks down the moment a reporter confronted Trump with the question no one else would ask: did the U.S. bomb a school in Iran?

Watch: https://youtu.be/RXLZA4VgVyA

Sen. Coons: The clearest winner from this war in Iran is Russia. It's stunning that Trump is on the phone with Vladimir Putin and spending more time consulting with him than he is with Congress and the American people.

You can’t win without a plan, and you can’t kill your way out of a war in the Middle East. Lt. General Mark Hertling joins the LP Pod to analyze the quagmire in Iran. Watch on YouTube through the link in bio.

Young men are starting to realize that politics isn't just a social media trend, and they're getting hurt. This is a major voting group which Dems should fight to win back this November. Watch The Breakdown on YouTube through the link in bio.
Trump's dismantling of our protections and squandering of resources is leaving us vulnerable, and at the worst possible time. Watch The Breakdown on YouTube through the link in our bio.

Republicans are now realizing there is no exit ramp from this war, because there was never supposed to be. Trump just wanted the distraction, and doesn’t care how many lives are lost. Watch the full episode through the link in bio.
Firing anyone who was prosecuting Trump was the first domino in this destruction of our law and order in Trump 2.0. Catch JP Cooney on the LP Podcast on our YouTube. Link in bio.
Policy debates will have to wait. Right now we need to save our democracy. Watch the full episode on the LP Podcast. Link in bio.
She had to have seen this one coming... Watch the full episode of The Breakdown at the link in our bio.
This war isn’t just stupid, it’s dangerous. Watch the LP Podcast on our YouTube. Link in bio.
Trump dementia update
